final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3x3 character expression grid for a Zhao Ling'er (赵灵儿) fan-art project, inspired by the Chinese Paladin (仙剑奇侠传) IP.

Style/medium: needs a 3D animation aesthetic with "Pixar style" direction — exact stylization level and render quality are yours
Composition: must be a 3x3 grid layout with 9 equal panels, each showing a character portrait peeking through a torn hole in white paper
Subject: must include Zhao Ling'er (赵灵儿) as the central character across all 9 panels, must include all 9 expressions/outfits/actions as specified:
  Top-left: winking, adjusting glasses, green sweater
  Top-center: smirking, lowering dark sunglasses, red leather jacket
  Top-right: thinking, finger on chin, yellow hoodie
  Middle-left: big smile, arms resting on edge, black and white striped shirt
  Middle-center: smiling, thumbs up, orange button-up shirt
  Middle-right: neutral, drinking boba tea, blue sweater
  Bottom-left: happy, waving, purple sweater vest over white shirt
  Bottom-center: laughing with eyes closed, arms crossed, pink cardigan
  Bottom-right: silly, poking cheeks, teal sweater
Scene/backdrop: must include torn white paper holes as the framing device for each panel
Lighting/mood: needs a cheerful, vibrant atmosphere — exact light source placement is yours
Color palette: needs a bright, varied palette matching the 9 outfit colors — exact color balancing is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "赵灵儿" or visual reference to the Chinese Paladin IP character identity
Constraints: must preserve the 3x3 grid structure, all 9 panels visible, each panel must show a distinct expression/outfit combination, character must peek through torn paper holes
Avoid: must avoid infringing on official copyrighted artwork — create original, non-infringing interpretation of the character concept
